violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The back of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the white microwave needs to be cleaned. The ice bin of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Front of the stove needs to be cleaned. The white shelves in the lower cabinet by the stove needs to be cleaned. The pizza oven crumb trays need to be cleaned, excessive food debris.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A sleeve of clear plastic containers was stored on the floor by the shelves in the kitchen.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foam plates on the prep cooler shelf and foam containers on the green cabinet up front were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device.m The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink by the ice machine did not work.
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
